svg.title: TriageTrace system architecture
svg.desc: Architecture of the TriageTrace temporal memory firewall, showing the operator browser, React and Nginx frontend, FastAPI backend modules, PostgreSQL with pgvector, and Qwen Cloud model services on Alibaba Cloud.

text.font-family: DejaVu Sans, Noto Sans, Arial, sans-serif
DejaVu Sans, Noto Sans, Arial, sans-serif

svg.text: Qwen-powered temporal memory firewall for incident-response agents
rate limit · schema validation · tenant resolution
one shared lifecycle for safe accumulation and recall
Produces the structured proposal; never executes it

g.text: eligible memory selected by the backend.
Public callers cannot assign trusted provenance,
authority, internal status, or validation state.
cross-tenant memories never enter the prompt.
Qwen proposes; the operator decides; simulation
screens predicted outcomes but executes nothing.
PASS / FAIL, memory IDs, and lifecycle states come
from backend workflow results—not hardcoded UI claims.
